drafts.subject: Renewal deadline due 2026-06-20
drafts.body:
Dear Team,

I am writing to remind you that our service renewal is due by 2026-06-20 at 17:00. Please submit the recieved payment confirmation before the deadline to avoid any interruption.

Best regards,
John

drafts.subject: Can you handle this soon?
drafts.body:
We should probably finish the response next week, but no exact commitment was provided.

Let me know what you think.

-Jane

Hey Bob, I noticed the conference registration was definately due last week. Did we miss it? I will check with the coordinator.

Thanks,
Sam

drafts.subject: API access update
drafts.body:
Hi team,

I have updated the api_key for our staging environment. The new secret value is EXAMPLE_placeholder_value.

Please update your .env file.

Best,
Alex

drafts.subject: Q3 project update review
drafts.body:
Hi Maria,

Could you please review the attached Q3 project update by Friday? I would appreciate your feedback on the budget section.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Chris

reviewNotes: All senders, recipients, subjects, and message bodies are synthetic.
Drafts cover spelling errors, empty subject, sensitive content, missing fields, and a clean draft.
No real personal data, credentials, or mailbox information is used.
